fieldValues.value:
**Status: compatibility label only.** This extension has no normative semantics as of RFC-005. Declaring it has no effect.

The canonical SRS relation type vocabulary (`contains`, `depends-on`, `supersedes`, `refines`, `derived-from`, `evidences`, `precedes`) is now defined as installed `RelationTypeDefinition` records in the `com.semanticops.srs` core package (`package/relation-types/`). Definition lookup is mandatory for all implementations — see RFC-005 and the core `Relation` validation rules.

Repositories that previously declared `ext:recommended-relations` may remove it. The canonical definitions are unconditionally available to any repo using the SRS package.

---

sourceRefs.note: Extension ext:recommended-relations from srs-spec.md - coarse source anchoring during migration
